name: Knife-Thrower of the Rakdos Revue
text: {1}{R}, {T}: Point at a creature, look away, and roll a six-sided die. On a 2 or higher, the knife lands true — it deals 3 damage to that creature. On a 1, the assistant is fine, mostly, and it deals 3 damage to a creature you control instead.
flavorText: "Helga has been my assistant for thirty years and has only nineteen fingers to show for it."

extras.physicalAction: point and look away before rolling
